title: Build a Google Ads Campaign Structure
tagline: Set up campaigns, ad groups, keywords, and match types for an online tutoring company.
scenario: An online tutoring company wants to run Google Search Ads for the first time. They offer Maths, English, and Science tutoring for high school students. Their monthly budget is R15,000.
brief: Design the campaign structure. Define the campaigns, ad groups, keywords (with match types), and write one ad for each ad group. You do not need a Google Ads account — document everything in Markdown.
deliverables: The campaign structure: campaign names, ad group names, and 5-8 keywords per ad group with match types (broad, phrase, exact)
One responsive search ad per ad group with 3 headlines and 2 descriptions
A list of negative keywords to prevent wasted spend
submissionGuidance: Match types matter enormously. Broad match for "maths tutor" will show your ad for "math games" and "tutor salary". Show you understand this.

rubric.label: Campaign Structure
rubric.description: Are campaigns and ad groups logically organised by service or intent?

rubric.label: Keyword Strategy
rubric.description: Are match types chosen correctly and negative keywords included?

rubric.label: Ad Copy
rubric.description: Are the ads compelling with clear CTAs and keyword relevance?
